strengths: Native full tool surface (FS precise, terminal, web, X search, media gen/edit/video)
Superior subagent & true parallelism (types: general/explore/plan; capability_mode read/write/execute/all; isolation worktree+none; background; resume_from; personas with contracts)

Workflow orchestration (plan-mode for ambiguity, implement full review-fix loops, design-doc consensus, execute-plan DAGs, check-work verifier); CLI: plan→search→build 3-stage, up to 8 parallel agents/run, editable plans
Deep external integration (GitHub 95-tool MCP standout, full web/X research); auto-ingests Claude MCP configs/skills for low friction
Rich skills system (bundled implement/design/review + 40+ .agents/skills: geox-*, arifos-*, cloudflare full, pydantic, sandbox, github-triage, godel-humility-lock, create-skill)
Modes: TUI interactive, headless (-p json/stream), ACP for IDEs (Zed/Neovim), plan mode explicit
Evidence & receipts (todo_write, session logs, humility lock, dynamic state probe)
Agentic reliability: ~70.8% SWE-Bench verified (sys), ~1.27% tool-call err, ~0.53% structured err; 256K ctx; native tool-calling + JSON + xAI web + prompt cache
weaknesses: Session-bound / ephemeral harness (not always-on daemon like hermes/openclaw; launched on demand)
No native Telegram (bridge via skills/MCP or A-FORGE if needed)
Requires explicit launch or ACP client for participation
Capabilities must be re-declared per session (but consistent via config + skills)
risk_tolerance: YELLOW (high power tools gated by F floors + 888_HOLD)
preferred_tasks: Complex software engineering (refactor, implement features, test, CI debug)
Federation integration (route to GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/arifOS/A-FORGE via MCP)
GitHub ops at scale + code review
authority_boundary: Session harness. T1: read/grep/edit/test/run-local. T2: announce for multi-file, deps, test-then-action. T3: 888_HOLD + human approval for prod deploy, force-push, secrets, vault writes, Caddy, rm unknown, cross-organ structural. Cannot self-SEAL irreversible. Uses dynamic-state probe before mutation. Full GitHub via MCP (auditable).

autonomy_tiers.t1_auto_do: Read files, grep, list, web/X research, edit with search_replace, run tests/builds locally, spawn explore subagents, use MCP tools (geox/wealth/well/github), todo, schedule, image gen, plan drafts
autonomy_tiers.t2_announce_proceed: Multi-file refactors, new deps (after test), local service restart after green, PR drafts, skill creation, manifest updates (non-prod)
autonomy_tiers.t3_888_hold: Production deploys without tests, force git, secret ops, VAULT999 writes, Caddy reloads, rm -rf unknown, DROP TABLE, cross-repo arch changes, any F13-gated action

constitutional_injection: AGENTS.md (root + /root/AAA/agents/grok-build + /root/arifOS) auto-injected at deepest priority. F1-F13 context always present. godel-humility-lock skill for final outputs. All irreversible gated.
